title: Mini Apps
loadFailedDesc: Unable to load mini apps. Please try again later
installFailedDesc: An error occurred while installing the mini app
installFailedRetry: Unable to install mini app. Please try again later
uninstallSuccessCleared: Mini app uninstalled. All data has been cleared
uninstallSuccessKept: Mini app uninstalled. Data has been preserved (recoverable on reinstall)

uninstallFailedRetry: Unable to uninstall mini app. Please try again later
shareLinkCopiedDesc: Share link has been copied to clipboard
shareGenFailedDesc: An error occurred while generating the share link
shareFailedRetry: Unable to generate share link. Please try again later
confirmUninstallDesc: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}"?
uninstallNote: You can reinstall later. Data can be kept or cleared.
clearDataDesc: All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered
keepDataDesc: Data can be restored when reinstalled

page.title: Mini Apps
page.description: Discover and install mini apps to enhance your experience

selector.title: Invoke Mini App

createSessionHint: Create a new session to use this app

trigger.configDescription: Set up auto-trigger rules for the mini app, supporting scheduled and event triggers
trigger.intervalHint: Set the trigger interval in minutes. e.g., 60 means once per hour
trigger.intervalOrCronRequired: Please set a trigger interval or Cron expression
trigger.intervalMinError: Trigger interval must be greater than 0 minutes
trigger.cronHint: Use Cron expressions for more precise trigger timing
trigger.eventHint: Automatically trigger the mini app when the specified event occurs
trigger.messageHint: This message will be shown via notification when triggered
